channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: PlayStation Portal : la console portable de Sony chute aujourd’hui à un prix inédit
item.description: Le PlayStation Portal est l'accessoire permettant de jouer à la PS5 à distance, mais plus uniquement. S'il vous intéresse, il est actuellement disponible à 189 euros au lieu de 219 euros.

item.title: 5G, 100 Go et sans engagement : ce forfait mobile B&You a tout pour lui [Sponso]
item.description: Un forfait 5G, sans engagement, avec un joli volume de data, des prestations haut de gamme et un prix raisonnable : c’est possible. Il suffit juste d’aller faire un tour dans le catalogue de Bouygues Telecom pour trouver son bonheur.

item.title: Amazon’s Zoox will test its robotaxis in Dallas and Phoenix
item.description: Amazon’s self-driving subsidiary Zoox announced on Monday that it will begin testing its autonomous vehicles in Dallas and Phoenix. The company will initially deploy retrofitted Toyota Highlander SUVs with human safety drivers to map the new cities before eventually rolling out its purpose-built robotaxis. Zoox says these two cities will offer a chance to test its sensors and battery performance in unique conditions its cars haven't yet encountered in existing markets. Phoenix experiences extreme heat, dust and high-speed roads, while Dallas has more sprawling roads and varied weather compared...

item.title: De l’IA au satanisme : comment ChatGPT aide les victimes d’abus rituels à briser le silence
item.description: L’intelligence artificielle d’OpenAI ne sert pas qu’à rédiger des mails ou générer du code. ChatGPT jouerait un rôle moteur dans la hausse des signalements d’abus rituels organisés, en orientant les victimes vers les associations compétentes.

item.title: WhatsApp : ce petit changement visuel sur Android va rendre l’application bien plus agréable
item.description: WhatsApp change subtilement l'apparence des bulles de discussions pour les utilisateurs Android. La différence est ténue, mais devrait apaiser l'expérience visuelle à la longue.

item.title: BYD dévoile le Sealion 06 en version Flash Charging : autonomie XXL et recharge en 5 minutes
item.description: BYD vient de dévoiler une nouvelle version du SUV électrique, le Sealion 06 qui gagne en autonomie, et en recharge rapide. Cette dernière est désormais effectuée en 5 minutes seulement.

item.title: Non, Microsoft n’a pas banni l’utilisation du terme « Microslop »
item.description: Microsoft prend la parole après le buzz d'un internaute affirmant qu'il n'a pas pu écrire « Microslop » dans un avis laissé sur le Microsoft Store.

item.title: Voici les prix français de la MG4 électrique : plus d’autonomie et d’équipements pour un prix cassé
item.description: La MG4 vient de s'améliorer avec une nouvelle planche de bord et une nouvelle batterie. Ses tarifs français viennent de tomber : déjà bien placée en tarif catalogue, la voiture électrique affiche un rapport qualité/prix imbattable une fois l'immense remise de la marque retirée.

item.title: 'No major vulnerabilities' — Mullvad’s WireGuard implementation gets thumbs up from independent security audit
item.description: Mullvad’s latest security audit on GotaTun gets green light from independent audit, confirming no major vulnerabilities were found. Here's all you need to know.

item.title: iPhone 17e Review: So Much More Bang for Your Buck
item.description: Apple addressed nearly every complaint about the iPhone 16e and kept the price the same. It's a good deal.

item.title: Zoox starts mapping Dallas and Phoenix for its robotaxis
item.description: It's a precursor to launching robotaxis in those cities, though the Amazon-owned company is still waiting for federal approval to commercially operate its purpose-built AV.

item.title: ADN lance une formule « Starter » à petit prix : voici ce qu’il faut savoir
item.description: ADN, la plateforme de streaming d’animes, dévoile une nouvelle formule d’abonnement pour les petits budgets. Pour 3,99 € par mois, les utilisateurs peuvent profiter d’un large catalogue d’œuvres, mais ça ne sera pas sans compromis.

item.title: SETI Thinks It Might Have Missed a Few Alien Calls. Here’s Why
item.description: The researchers who scan the skies for radio signals from extraterrestrials are now rethinking their approach.

item.title: Un Unlock Talk haut en couleurs et une double Matinale Twitch : voici notre programme de la semaine
item.description: Notre programme Twitch de la semaine du lundi 9 mars 2026, c’est juste ici : nous vous donnons rendez-vous, mardi, mercredi et vendredi sur notre chaîne Frandroidlive, pour une double Matinale Tech' et le retour d'Unlock Talk.

item.title: Hasbro’s CEO has an AI Peppa Pig help design toys
item.description: Today, I’m talking with Chris Cocks, CEO of Hasbro. You know, Hasbro — the toy and game company that makes some of the most iconic products in the world, from toy lines like Transformers and My Little Pony to board and tabletop games like Monopoly, Magic: The Gathering, and Dungeons & Dragons. Chris was last […]

item.title: Anthropic says it found a heap of Firefox security flaws using new Claude tools, says 'AI is making it possible to detect severe security vulnerabilities at highly accelerated speeds'
item.description: Claude finds 14 high-severity Firefox bugs in just a few weeks, rivaling what Mozilla could do in months.

item.title: Can't afford a Leica? The latest craze in China is just engraving the name into Panasonic cameras instead
item.description: Chinese social media is awash with images of customized Panasonic Lumix cameras, especially those with Leica branding. I mean, the craze kind of makes sense...

item.title: Netflix : comment accéder à 36 000 catégories cachées avec des codes secrets ? Nos astuces
item.description: Vous passez plus de temps à chercher qu'à regarder sur Netflix ? Vous avez l'impression de voir toujours les mêmes recommandations tourner en boucle ? C'est normal : l'algorithme ne vous montre qu'une infime partie du catalogue. Derrière votre page d'accueil se cachent plus de 36 000 catégories accessibles via des codes secrets. Voici comment les utiliser. ...

item.title: Best Base Layers (2026): Merino Wool, Synthetic, and More
item.description: Whether you’re layering up for winter cold or looking for an ultralight summer system, I’ve tested and found the best base layers for all your outdoor adventures.

item.title: Expect Grogu to Talk in ‘The Mandalorian and Grogu’, Do Not
item.description: The new 'Star Wars' movie will not answer the biggest linguistic debate of the galaxy: who's the anomaly of their species, Yoda or Yaddle?

item.title: What is the release date for Scrubs season 10 episode 4 on Hulu and Disney+?
item.description: Here's when and where you can catch Scrubs' next episode, which is called 'My Poker Face'.

item.title: Asus just released new open earbuds... for gaming?
item.description: Asus has released the ROG Cetra Open Wireless open gaming earbuds.

item.title: The Apple MacBook Air 13-inch (M5) is still the best ultraportable I've ever used — and I wrote this review on it
item.description: The MacBook Air 13-inch (M5) gets a faster chip and hard drive, but Apple has left alone what works well enough already — and that's a lot.

item.title: There's still time to save on some top PS5 and Portal accessories at PlayStation Direct before the sale ends tonight
item.description: Kit yourself out — for less

item.title: Moins 500 euros pour ce puissant PC portable MSI (Intel Core Ultra 7, RTX 5060) boosté à l’intelligence artificielle
item.description: En plus de sa confortable dalle IPS de 15 pouces, le MSI VenturePro 15 est équipé d'un Intel Core Ultra 7 pour pouvoir répondre à tous vos besoins. Ce laptop est actuellement disponible pour 1 099 euros chez Boulanger.

item.title: VPNs surge in Australia as mandatory age verification for adult content begins
TriZetto data breach: health tech giant reveals personal info of 3.4 million users may have been affected
item.description: Hackers were reportedly pulling patient data for a year, including names, SSNs, and more.

item.title: Apple iPhone 17e hands-on: New chip, more storage memory, and yes, MagSafe
item.description: Apple's iPhone 17e has a new chip, more storage memory, and MagSafe, but it looks and feels the same as last year's model.

item.title: Score the best 11-inch iPad Air preorder deal at Amazon — save $40 on this new M4 iPad
item.description: As of March 9, Amazon has knocked $40 off 11-inch iPad Air (M4, 128GB, WiFi) pre-orders. This has dropped their price from $599 to $559.

item.title: iPad Air M4 review: Still Apple's best overall tablet, with a few caveats
item.description: Perhaps one of the most surprising things about the Apple Silicon era is how quickly Apple now updates its products. Take the iPad Air, for example. It’s been less than two years since the company released the M2-powered iPad Air in 11- and 13-inch sizes. We’re already on our third iPad Air iteration, one with the M4 inside. That’s the same chip that was inside the iPad Pro that was unveiled alongside that M2-powered Air in 2024. (The Pro was updated with an M5 last fall.) Just as I said a year ago when Apple unveiled the iPad Air M3, this latest model doesn’t fundamentally change the formula....

item.title: Grosse confusion autour de la date de lancement de la Steam Machine
item.description: Sortira, sortira pas ? La fenêtre de lancement de la Steam Machine et des autres produits annoncés par Valve en novembre dernier a été au cœur d'un joli pataquès durant le week-end. Au bout du compte, rien ne change… sauf qu'on a eu très peur.

item.title: La Nasa remplace discrètement l’étage clé de sa fusée pour Artemis III
item.description: Alors que la Nasa a annoncé une refonte du programme lunaire Artemis, la fusée SLS (Space Launch System) va changer d'étage supérieur. C'est désormais un Centaur V qui va servir à propulser la mission Artemis III.

item.title: This Canon laser printer offers super-fast printing, scanning, and copying - ideal for small businesses, it’s now under $330
item.description: Canon imageCLASS MF465dw laser printer delivers fast printing, scanning and copying and with 40% off it's currently under $330.

item.title: Beyond the Shadows: The Untold Black History of Film Noir
item.description: Filmmaker Tarik Rashaan Davis takes a deep dive into the evolution of the film noir genre, spanning from classic hard-boiled noir to neo-noir and explores it's roots in Black culture.

item.title: Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra : voici ce que font les pixels quand vous activez l’affichage confidentiel
item.description: Grâce à un objectif macro, nous pouvons voir comment agissent les pixels de l'écran du Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra quand on active l'affichage confidentiel.

item.title: M4 iPad Air review: A tablet that thinks its an AI laptop
item.description: Mashable went hands-on with the new iPad Air, powered by the M4 chip. It's a powerful creator's tablet with the power of a laptop.

item.title: 3 of the biggest new Netflix shows to stream in March 2026
item.description: Netflix has seriously impressed me this month, here are three huge shows you won't want to miss.

item.title: ‘Daredevil: Born Again’ Showrunner Teases Jessica Jones’ Return
item.description: Plus, new rumors about casting the 'X-Files' reboot.

item.title: M4 iPad Air Review: The ‘Better’ iPad Is Now Really That Good
item.description: Small upgrades and an improved iPadOS change everything.

item.title: Apple iPhone 17e Review: MagSafe Makes a Difference
item.description: A bump in storage and the addition of MagSafe make Apple's cheapest iPhone a better value proposition than its predecessor.

item.title: Feeld Was a Dating App for the Freaks. Now Some People Call It ‘Normie Hell’
item.description: The app that catered to unconventional kinks is gaining steam among daters with vanilla preferences—and some aren’t happy about it.

item.title: Panic’s gaming ambitions hinge on the weird and whimsical
item.description: A game about an annoying goose with a button dedicated entirely to honking isn't the obvious recipe for a hit. But doing the less-obvious thing has become the norm for Panic's gaming efforts, which have included everything from the Playdate handheld to the surprisingly popular Untitled Goose Game. So when it came time for developer […]

item.title: The iPhone 17E is good, but you probably shouldn’t buy it
item.description: The iPhone 17E is a better value than the 16E was when it arrived, but that should matter to basically nobody. The main thing to know about the 17E is that the iPhone 17 exists, it costs $200 more - or maybe more significantly, an extra $9 per month on a two-year payment plan not […]

item.title: Apple iPad Air M4 review: a little bit faster now
item.description: The newest iPad Air is a chip bump iPad - maybe the chip-bump-iest iPad Air yet. Inside this new machine are, in fact, three upgraded chips compared to last year's model: an M4 processor, a C1X cellular modem, and an N1 chip that brings the Air Wi-Fi 7, Bluetooth 6, and Thread support. That is […]

item.title: The 2027 Chevy Bolt is the McRib of the automotive world
item.description: TechCrunch drove the 2027 Chevy Bolt and found that incremental improvements build on a solid basic recipe to deliver an affordable EV.

item.title: I tested the iPad Air with M4, and Apple just stretched the value proposition even further
item.description: Apple's 13-inch iPad Air doesn't change much in terms of looks, but the M4 chip under the hood certainly speeds things up.

item.title: I tested the iPhone 17e, and it's an even better budget iPhone thanks to more storage, faster performance, and a smarter camera
item.description: With the A19 chip, double the starting storage, and the addition of MagSafe, it makes the best-value iPhone even more compelling.

item.title: iPhone 17e review: The economical choice
item.description: By introducing the iPhone 17e just a year after the iPhone 16e, Apple is closing some gaps. Before, the company would only roll out a new entry-level iPhone every few years, with the iPhone 5c (2013), iPhone XR (2018) and iPhone SE (2016, 2020, 2022) all having two to four years between their releases. But Apple is getting into an annual groove now, and having renamed the device to integrate better with the rest of the iPhone lineup, Apple is making a clear statement: It cares about the midrange now. With the current state of global economics, Apple’s focus on lower cost devices like the iPho...

item.title: Prise en main | Apple iPhone 17e : le printemps peut commencer
item.description: Une nouvelle habitude printanière se dessine dans le marché nord-américain du sans-fil : celle des téléphones bon marché. Après Google il y a deux semaines, Apple vient de lancer sa propre proposition d’entrée de gamme, un iPhone 17e qui coûte moitié moins cher qu’un iPhone 17, et dont la performance n’est pas si réduite que ça par sa fiche technique limitée....
